channel.title: SwiftBill Blog — POS Billing, GST, and Indian Retail
channel.description: Expert guides on POS billing, GST compliance, inventory management, and retail technology for Indian businesses. By SwiftBill — free, open-source billing software.

item.title: Best Free POS Billing Software for Indian Retail Shops in 2026
item.description: A comprehensive guide to choosing free point-of-sale billing software for your Indian retail business — features, GST compliance, offline support, and why open source wins.
item.dc:creator: SwiftBill

item.title: GST Billing Compliance Guide for Small Businesses in India (2026)
item.description: Everything Indian small business owners need to know about GST-compliant billing — tax slabs, HSN codes, invoice formats, GSTR-1 filing, and how to automate it all.
item.dc:creator: SwiftBill

item.title: Why Offline POS Billing Matters for Indian Retail in 2026
item.description: Internet outages cost Indian retailers thousands in lost sales every month. Here's why offline-first billing software is essential and how to set it up.
item.dc:creator: SwiftBill

item.title: How to Digitize Your Kirana Store: A Complete 2026 Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guide for kirana store owners to go digital — from billing software to inventory management, UPI payments, and customer loyalty programs.
item.dc:creator: SwiftBill

item.title: Open Source POS vs. Commercial POS: An Honest Comparison for 2026
item.description: Should you choose open-source or commercial POS software? We compare cost, features, security, support, and long-term viability for Indian businesses.
item.dc:creator: SwiftBill

item.title: 10 Inventory Management Tips Every Small Indian Retailer Should Know
item.description: Practical inventory management strategies for Indian retail shops — from ABC analysis to reorder points, demand forecasting, and reducing dead stock.
item.dc:creator: SwiftBill
